item.title: oldcode
item.content:encoded:
//1.单行文本溢出
    overflow: hidden;            // 溢出隐藏
    text-overflow: ellipsis;      // 溢出用省略号显示
    white-space: nowrap;         // 规定段落中的文本不进行换行

    //2.多行文本溢出
    overflow: hidden;            // 溢出隐藏
    text-overflow: ellipsis;     // 溢出用省略号显示
    -webkit-line-clamp:3;        // 显示的行数
    display:-webkit-box;         // 作为弹性伸缩盒子模型显示。
    -webkit-box-orient:vertical; // 设置伸缩盒子的子元素排列方式：从上到下垂直排列
    //根据年份计算总周数
    function getNumOfWeeks(years){
        //设置为这一年开始日期
        var startDateOfYear = new Date(years,0,1)
        //计算这一年有多少天
        var daysOfYear = ((year % 4 == 0 && year % 100 !=0) || year % 400 === 0) ? 366 : 365
        //366(365) / 7 = 52.2(52.1),所以一般一年有52周余一天或者两天，当这一年有366天时且第一天是周日，那么最后一天是周一，这一年就是54周
        var weekNum = 53
        //当年份是闰年且第一天是周日时有54周
        if (startDateOfYear.getDay() == 0 && daysOfYear == 366){
            weekNum = 54
        }
        return weekNum
    }
    //根据上周日获取这周日的日期范围
    function getDateRange(lastSunday) {
        if(lastSunday == null || lastSunday == ''){
            return "";
        }
        var beginDate = new Date(lastSunday.setDate(lastSunday.getDate() + 1))
        var endDate = new Date(lastSunday.setDate(lastSunday.getDate() + 6))
        return '('+ getNowFormatDate(beginData)+ ')-' + '('+getNowFormatDate(endDate)+')'
    }
    //时间转换成字符串
    function getNowFormatDate(date){
        var Month = 0;
        var Day = 0;
        var CurrentStr=''
        //初始化时间
        Month = date.getMonth() + 1
        Day = date.getDate()
        if(Month >= 10){
            CurrentStr += Month + '月'
        }else {
            CurrentStr += '0'+Month +'月'
        }
        if(Day >= 10){
            CurrentStr += Day + '日'
        }else{
            CurrentStr += '0' + Day + '日'
        }
        return CurrentStr
    }
  let copyList = [] as any
        stationList.value.forEach((item: any) => {
          copyList.push(item.stationNumber)
        })
        const input = document.createElement('input')
        input.value = copyList.toString()
        document.body.appendChild(input)
        input.select()
        document.execCommand('copy')
        document.body.removeChild(input)
        ElNotification({
          message: '复制成功',
          type: 'success'
        })

item.title: code
item.content:encoded:
//后端返回流后可以预览pdf和图片
        exportPreview(row){
         if(!row.id)return this.$message.warning('请上传文件保存后操作')
       if(row.fileName.includes('.png') || row.fileName.includes('.jpg')) {
            const imgWindow = window.open("");
            imgWindow && imgWindow.document.write(`<image src=url style='display: flex; margin: 0 auto'/>`);
       }else if (row.fileName.includes('.pdf') ) {
          this.$http
        .get(
          url,{responseType:"blob"}
        )
         .then((responseProcess) => {
          const pdfFile = window.URL.createObjectURL(
            new Blob([responseProcess.data], { type: "application/pdf;base64" })
          );
          window.open(pdfFile + "#toolbar=0");
          URL.revokeObjectURL(pdfFile)
        });
       }else{
        this.$message.warning('暂无法预览')
       }
   //element-ui 中的确认框 输入文字信息 $prompt配置项
   this.$prompt('请','提示',{
    confirmButton:'确定',
    cancelButtonText:'取消',
    closeOnClickModal:false,
    inputType:'textarea',
    inputValidator:'',
    inputErrorMessage:'驳回意见不能为空',
    inputPlaceholder:'最多输入100个字符',
    inputPattern:/^[\s\S]*.*[^\s][\s\S]*$/,
    type:'warning'
   }).then(({value})=>{
     object.xxx = value
     //函数
   }).catch(()=>{
    this.$message({
      type:'info',
      message:'取消输入'
    })
   })

item.title: el-table
item.content:encoded:
// 有返回值得称作表达式
    //el-table 有一个合计功能可以自定义也可以指定属性 在el-table中show-summary :summary-method="getSummaries"
    <el-table
        show-summary
        :summary-method="getSummaries"
    >
    <el-table-column type="selection" width="80" />
    <!-- 动态日期 -->
    <template v-if="">
        <el-table-column
            :prop="item.month_value"
            :label="item.month_value"
            v-for="item in monthList"
            width="150"
        >
            <template slot-scope="scope">
                <el-input
                    style="display:inline-block;width:75%"
                    size="mini"
                    v-model="scope.row[scope.column.property]"
                    @input="inputChange($event,scope.$index)"
                    :readonly="readonly"
                    :disabled="disabled"
                    placeholder="请输入百分比"
                >
                <span>%</span>
                </el-input>
            </template>
        </el-table-column>
    </template>
    </el-table>
//保留小数点后两位补0.00的格式
    toDecimal2(x){
        let f = Math.round(x * 100) /100
        let s = f.toString()
        let rs = s.indexOf('.')
        if(rs < 0){
            rs = s.length
            s += '.'
        }
        while(s.length <= rs + 2){
            s += '0'
        }
        return s
    }
//保留两位小数不四舍五入
    formatDecimal(num,decimal){
        num = num.toString()
        let index = num.indexOf('.')
        if(index !== -1) {
            num = num.substring(0, decimal + index + 1)
        } else {
            num = num.substring(0)
        }
        return num
    }
    getSummaries(param) {
        let tailTotalList = [] //接收后端返回的参数
        const { columns, data } = param
        const sums = []
        let totalNumber = 0
        let totalPrice = 0
        let inx = 0
        let tailTotal = {}
        columns.forEach((colum,index,arr) => {
            if(index === 0){
                sum[index] = '合计（元）'
                return
            }
            if(index === 3) {
                totalPrice = data.map((item)=>Number(item[column.property]))
                if(!totalPrice.every((value)=>isNaN(value))){
                    sums[index] = totalPrice.reduce((prev,current)=>{
                        const value = Number(current)
                        if(!isNaN(value)){
                            return prev + current
                        }else {
                            return prev
                        }
                    },0)
                }else {
                    sums[index] = 0
                }
                tailTotal.totalPrice = sums[index]
            } else if(index < 4) {
                sums[index] = '--'
            }
        })
        if(tailTotalList.length != 0){
            tailTotal.id = tailTotalList[0].id
        }
        projectBudgetBaseList = []
        projectBudgetBaseList.push(tailTotal)
        return sums
    }
    computed:{
        updateInfo:function(){
            let self = this;
            let bo = false;
            let i = 0;
            self.item.forEach(function(e){
                bo = bo || e.update;
                if(e.status > i) i = e.status
            })
            if(bo) return 0
            else return i
        }
    }

item.title: sofaraway
item.content:encoded:
//echarts 配置项 写下来
    //1.  title: 图表的标题
    //2.  legend: 图例
    //3.  graphic: 自定义图像or文本
    //4.  toolbox: 右上图标操作
    //5.  visualMap: 视觉映射
    //6.  tooltip: 提示弹框
    //7.  yAxis: y轴
    //8.  xAxis: x轴
    //9.  series: 图标系列
    //10. timeline: 时间轴
    //11. dataZoom: 区域缩放
   //输出 true or false example:i: s='{}' o: true  i : s='( ]' o : false
   //method 1 
    const isValid = (s) => {
        while(true){ //无限循环
            let len = s.length
            s = s.replace('{}', '').replace('[]','').replace('()','')
            //输出true的情况为s匹配完后长度为0，
            if(s.length === len){
                return len === 0
            }
        }
    }
    //method 2
    const isValid = (s) => {
        //空字符串符合条件
        if(!s){
            return true
        }
        const leftToRight = {
            '(':')',
            '[':']',
            '{':'}'
        }
        const stack = []
        for (let i = 0, len = s.length; i < len; i++){
            const ch = s[i]
            if(leftToRight[ch]){
                stack.push(ch)
            }else{
                if(!stack.length || leftToRight[stack.pop()] !== ch){
                    return false
                }
            }
        }
        return !stack.length
    }

item.title: viteoneday
item.content:encoded:
//使用vite + vue3 命令npm init vue@latest 创建项目
    // 组件就是一个对象 类似于构造函数
     //Does the file exist?Vue3导入文件失败问题(没有加后缀)

    //vue2 使用vuex的写法 example:
    //store文件中有modules modules中有demo 那么在demo.js中有
    const state = {
        info:{}
    }
    const mutations = {
        RECEVICE_INFO(state,info){
            state.info = info
        }
    }
    const actions = {
        getData({commit},value){
            //发请求把请求到的数据commit 给mutations
            //在组件中可以使用this.$store.dispatch('getData')调用
            //使用mapState拿到请求的数据 ...mapState({
            //    info:(state)=>state.demo.info
            // })
            commit('RECEVICE_INFO',res)
        }
    }
    const getters = {}
    export default {
        state,
        mutations,
        actions,
        getters
    }

item.title: .eleTable
item.content:encoded:
去掉element-table的勾选el-checked样式
    ::v-deep .el-table__header-wrapper .el-checkbox {
    display: none ;
}
    toDecimal2(x) {
      var f = parseFloat(x);
      if (isNaN(f)) {
        return false;
      }
      var f = Math.round(x * 100) / 100;
      var s = f.toString();
      var rs = s.indexOf('.');
      if (rs < 0) {
        rs = s.length;
        s += '.';
      }
      while (s.length <= rs + 2) {
        s += '0';
      }
      console.log(s, 'ssssss')
      return s;
    }

item.title: seeDocusaurus
item.content:encoded:
• see you again
  • B
  • C
//在vue2中有如果列表点击事件在每一项item上 可以使用自定义属性拿到参数进行收集相当于一种原生的事件委派机制 并且这里的高亮显示会用到参考值思想 example:
<ul  click="clickEvent">
 <li> 
    <span :data-key = "item.id"></span>
 <li>
</ul>
 //在script中也就是methods:
clickEvent(event){
    const data = event.target.dataset
    console.log(data,'data')
}
还没研究好
不用了
vue2 element-ui封装 //publicForm 公共el-form
    <el-form 
        :inline="true"
        :model="ruleForm"
        :rules="rules"
        ref="ruleForm"
        label-width="150px"
        class="demo-ruleForm"
        size="mini"
    >
        <template v-for="(item,index) in formconfig">
            <el-form-item
                v-if="!item.show"
                :label="`${item.label}:`"
                :prop="item.prop"
                :label-width="item.labelWidth"
                :style="{ width: item.formWidth}"
            >
                <el-input
                    v-if="item.type == 'text'"
                    :disable="item.disabled"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || ''"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    :maxlength="item.maxlength"
                    :show-word-limit="true"
                    @focus="callback(item,index,$event)"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item, index)"
                    @clear="clear(item,index)"
                    clearable
                >
                    <i
                        v-if="item.icon"
                        class="el-input__icon"
                        :class="{ 'el-icon-edit':item.icon }"
                        :slot="item.event == 'focus' ? 'prefix' : 'suffix'"
                        @click="handleIconClick(item,index)"
                    ></i>
                        <template>{{item.slotLabel}}</template>                    
                    </i>
                </el-input>
                <el-autocomplete
                    v-if="item.type == 'autocomplete'"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请输入或选择内容'"
                    :style="{width:item.width}"
                    clearable
                    :fetch-suggestions="querySearch"
                    @focus="setAutocompleteArr(item,index)"
                    @select="havedSelect"
                ></el-autocomplete>
                <el-input-number
                    :style="{ width: item.width } || '148px'"
                    v-if="item.type == 'number'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    controls-position="right"
                    :step="item.step || 1"
                    :precision="item.precision || 2"
                    :min="item.min || 0"
                    :max="item.max"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ></el-input-number>
                <el-input
                    v-if="item.type == 'textarea'"
                    type="textarea"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    :rows="item.row"
                    autosize
                    :maxlength="item.maxlength"
                    :show-word-limit="true"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || ''"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ></el-input>
                <el-select
                    v-if="item.type == 'select'"
                    :disable="item.disabled"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请选择'"
                    :style="{ width:item.width }"
                    @change="changedata(index,item)"
                    filterable
                    :multiple="item.multiple"
                    :multiple-limit="item.multipleLimit"
                    :collapse-tags="item.collapseTags"
                    :allow-create="item.allowCreate"
                    clearable
                >
                    <el-option
                        v-for="i in item.list"
                        :key="i.value"
                        :label="i.label || i.text || i.name"
                        :value="i.value || i.id"
                        :disabled="i.disabled"
                    ></el-option>
                </el-select>
                <template v-if="item.type == 'selectMonth'">
                    <el-select
                        clearable
                        :style="{ width: item.width || '148px' }"
                        v-model.trim="formInfo[item.prop][0]"
                        :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请选择'"
                        size="mini"
                        @change="changedata(index,item,'start')"
                    >
                        <el-option
                            v-for="i in item.list || formatMonth"
                            :key=" i.value"
                            :label="i.name"
                            :value="i.value"
                        >
                        </el-option>
                    </el-select>
                    <label for style="fontsize: 12px;color:#7b7f83">{{item.go || ''}}</label>
                    <el-select 
                    clearable 
                    :style="{ width: item.width || '148px' }"
                    v-model.trim="formInfo[item.prop][1]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请选择'"
                    size="mini"
                    @change="changedata(index,item,'end')"
                    >
                        <el-option 
                        v-for="i in item.listend || formatMonth"
                        :key="i.paraCode"
                        :label="i.paraKey"
                        :value="i.paraCode"
                        ></el-option>
                    </el-select>
                </template>
                <el-select
                 clearable
                 v-if="item.type == 'selectYear'"
                 v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                 :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请选择'"
                 :style=" { width:item.width } "
                >
                    <el-option
                        v-for="i in formatYear"
                        :key="i.paraCode"
                        :label="i.paraKey"
                        :value="i.paraCode"
                    ></el-option>
                </el-select>
                <el-cascader
                    v-if="item.type == 'cascader'"
                    :options="item.options"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    clearable
                    @change="changedata(index,item)"
                    :change-on-select="item.onlySelect"
                    :show-all-levels="item.levels"
                    :style="{ width:item.width }"
                ></el-cascader>
                <el-radio-group
                    v-if="item.type == 'radio'"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    :placeholder="item.placeholder || ''"
                    @change="changedata(index,item)"
                >
                    <template v-for="i in item.list">
                        <el-radio>{{i.label}}</el-radio>
                    </template>
                </el-radio-group>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    :value-format="'yyyy-MM-dd'"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'date'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择日期"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ></el-date-picker>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'datetime'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择日期"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ></el-date-picker>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'daterange'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    range-separator="至"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择日期"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handler(item,index)"
                ></el-date-picker>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
                    :disable="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'datetiemrange'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    range-separator="至"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择日期"
                    :style=" { width:item.width } "
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ><el-date-picker>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'year'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择年"
                    :style=" { width: item.width } "
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                >
                </el-date-picker>
                <el-time-picker
                    clearable
                    :value-format="item.format || 'HH:mm:ss'"
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'time'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    placeholder="选择时间"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handler(item,index)"
                ></el-time-picker>
                <el-date-picker
                    clearable
                    :disabled="item.disabled"
                    v-if="item.type == 'month'"
                    v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                    align="right"
                    :type="item.type"
                    placeholder="选择月"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                    @blur="handleBlur(item,index)"
                ></el-date-picker>
                <span
                    class="plainText"
                    v-if="item.type == 'plainText'"
                    :style="{ width: item.width }"
                >{{ formInfo[item.prop] }}</span>
                <template v-if="item.type == 'selectText'">
                    <div>
                        <el-select
                            :disable="item.disabled"
                            v-model="formInfo[item.prop]"
                            :placeholder="item.placeholder || '请选择'"
                            :style="{ width: item.width }"
                            @change="changedata(index,item)"
                            filterable
                            allow-create
                            default-first-option
                        >
                            <el-option
                                v-for="i in item.list"
                                :key="i.value"
                                :label="i.label"
                                :value="i.value"
                                :disable="i.disabled"
                            >
                            </el-option>
                        </el-select>
                    </div>
                </template>
            </el-form-item>
        </template>
    </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
    props:{
        formcofig:{
            //表单配置数据
            type: Array,
        },
        formInfo: {
            //表单默认显示数据
            type:Object,
        },
        rules: {
            //表单验证
            type: Object,
        }
    },
    mounted(){},
    watch:{},
    data(){
        return {
            //input类型伟autocomplete时动态过滤的数组
            restaurants:[],
            formItemIndex: 0,
        }
    },
    computed: {
        formatMonth() {
            return [
                {
                    paraCode:'01',
                    paraKey:'一月,
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'02',
                    paraKey:'二月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'03',
                    paraKey:'三月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'04',
                    paraKey:'四月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'05',
                    paraKey:'五月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'06',
                    paraKey:'六月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'07',
                    paraKey:'七月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'08',
                    paraKey:'八月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'09',
                    paraKey:'九月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'10',
                    paraKey:'十月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'11',
                    paraKey:'十一月',
                },
                {
                    paraCode:'12',
                    paraKey:'十二月',
                }
            ]
        },
        formatYear(){
            let dateList = []
            for(let i = 0; i < 7; i++){
                dateList.push(new Date().getFullYear() + i - 5)
            }
            let select = []
            dateList.forEach((item)=>{
                const obj = {
                    paraCode:item,
                    paraKey:item
                }
                select.push(obj)
            })
            return select.reverse()
        }
    },
    methods:{
        setAutocompleteArr(val,index){
            //动态设定数组
            this.restaurants = val.list
            this.formItemIndex = index
        },
        havedSelect(val){
            //默认弹框出现会出现select 下拉触发必填验证
            this.$refs.ruleForm.clearValidate(
                this.formconfig[this.formItemIndex].prop
            )
            this.$emit('autoCompleteSelected',val)
        },
        querySearch(queryString,cb){
            //输入时的过滤方法
            let restaurants = this.restaurants
            let results = queryString ? restaurants.filter(this.createFilter(queryString)) : restaurants
            //调用 callback 返回建议列表的数据
            cb(results)
        },
        createFilter(queryString){
            //自定义过滤
            return (restaurant) => {
                return (
                    restaurant.value.toLowerCase().indexOf(queryString.toLowerCase()) === 0
                )
            }
        },
        handleIconClick(item,i){
            if(this.formconfig[i].icon == true) {
                if(this.formconfig[i].event == 'focus'){
                    this.formconfig[i].event = ''
                }else{
                    this.formconfig[i].event = 'focus'
                }
                this.$emit('handleIconClick,{ item, i })
            } else {
            }
        },
        handleBlur(item,i) {
            if(item.event == 'blur') {
                this.$emit('handleBlur',{ item,i })
            }
        },
        clear(item,index){
            if(item.event == 'focus'){
                for(let p in item) {
                    if(this.ruleForm[item[p]]){
                        this.ruleForm[item[p]] = ''
                    }
                }
                this.$emit('clear',{item,index})
            }
        },
        callback(item,index,e){
            if(item.event == 'focus'){
                e.target.blur()
                this.$emit('callback',{ item, index})
            }else{
                return false
            }
        },
        buttonEvent(item) {
            this.$emit('buttonEvent', item)
        },
        changedata(ind,item,state){
            if((item.type == 'selectMonth' || item.type == 'select' || item.type == 'radio' || item.type == 'cascader') && item.event == 'change') {
                this.$emit('selectChange', { item, ind, state })
            }
        },
        //直接保存可以调用这个组件的实例，写保存需要接收saveForm
        submitForm(){
            this.$refs.ruleForm.validate((valid)=>{
                if(valid) {
                    this.$emit('saveForm',this.ruleForm)
                }else{
                    return false
                }
            })
        },
        resetForm() {
            //重置表格数据
            this.$refs.ruleForm.resetFields()
        }
    }
}

</script>
<style scoped>
.el-input .el-input__inner{
    border-radius:0px;
}
.el-input{
    width:100%;
}
.el-input.is-disabled .el-input__inner {
    background-color: #f5f7fa;
}
.el-form--inline .el-form-item {
    margin -right: 0px;
}
i.el-input__icon.el-icon-edit{
    color:rgba(255,163,82,1);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 16px;
}
i.el-input__icon {
    height: auto;
}
.plainText {
    display: inline-block;
    font-weight: 900;
}
</style>
// 组件调用
      <public-form
        :formconfig="formconfig"
        :formInfo="formInfo"
        :rules="rulesAdd"
        @selectChange="selectChange"
        @handleBlur="handleBlur"
      ></public-form>

      <script>
        export default {
            name:'',
            props:{},
            data(){
                return {
                    formconfig:[
                        {
                            label:'',
                            prop:'',
                            type:'select',
                            value:'',
                            disable:false,
                            labelWidth:'',
                            list:,
                            event:'change' //此处change事件  为这个selectChange(item)传递参数
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        }
      </script>

item.title: 十二月03
item.description: 服务器为多端服务Rest 返回json数据
item.content:encoded:
服务器为多端服务Rest 返回json数据​

mvvm 模型 视图 视图模型 vm是创建实例的 npm init -y npm i vite -D npm i vue

item.title: 十二月第一天
item.content:encoded:
element-ui​

    // vue 城市选择器的使用 element-china-area-data 
    // 按装 npm install element-china-area-data -S

nvm​

    // nvm node任意版本切换
    // nvm 下载地址 https://github.com/coreybutler/nvm-windows/releases
    /*
    nvm list  -查看node版本
    nvm install -安装指定版本的node
    配置nvm的镜像服务器 nvm node_mirror https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/node/
    nvm install lts -安装稳定版
    nvm use xxx 指定要使用的node版本
    */

code​

    Date.prototype.toLocalString = function () {
        let month = this.getMonth() + 1
        let _month = month < 10? '0' + month : month
        let today = this.getDate() < 10 ? '0' + this.getDate() : this.getDate()
        return this,getFullYear() + '/' +_month + '/' + today
    }
    Date.prototype.toLocalString = function () {
        let month = this,getMonth + 1
        let _month = month < 10? '0' + this.getDate() : this.getDate()
        let today = this.getDate() < 10? '0' + this.getDate() : this.getDate()
        let h = this.getHours() < 10? '0' + this.getHours() : this.getHours()
        let m = this.getMinutes() < 10? '0' + this.getMinutes() : this.getMinutes()
        let s = this.getSeconds() < 10? '0' + this.getSeconds() : this.getSeconds()
        return this.getFullYear() + '-' + _month + '-' + today+' ' + h + ':' + m + ':'+ s
    }

item.title: one day
item.content:encoded:
Base64 study​

    function getBase64(file:any){
        return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
            // FileReader类就是用来读文件的
            const reader = new FileReader()
            // 开始读文件
            // readAsDataURL: dataurl它的本质就是图片的二进制数据，进行base64加密后形成的一个字符串
            reader.readAsDataURL(file)
            // 成功和失败返回对应的信息， reader.result一个base64,可以直接使用
            reader.onload = () => resolve(reader.result)
            // 失败返回失败的信息
            reader.onerror = (error) =>reject(error)
        })
    }

    //tsx封装一个可拖拽的左中右布局 flex 的 三个参数：flex-grow、flex-shrink、flex-basis
   import {defineComponent,ref,onMounted,nextTick,reactive,computed} from 'vue'
   import { useStore } from 'vuex'
   export default defineComponent({
    name: 'ResizeCom',
    props:{
        leftWidth:{
            default: 260,
            type: Number
        },
        rightWidth: {
            default: 250,
            type:Number
        },
        leftClass: {
            default: '',
            type: String
        },
        centerClass: {
            default: '',
            type: String
        },
        rightClass: {
            default: '',
            type: String
        },
        leftStyle: {
            default: '',
            type:String
        },
        bg: {
            default: false,
            type: Boolean
        }
    },
    emits:['update:leftWidth','update:rightWidth'],
    setup(props, { slots }){
        const store = useStore()
        const rw = ref(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(props.rightWidth)))
        const doResize = (line:string,box:string):void => {
            const lineDom: any = document.querySelector(line)
            const boxDom: any = document.querySelector(box)
            if (!boxDom) return
            lineDom.onmousedown = (e:any):boolean => {
                const start = e.clientX
                const itemWidth = boxDom.clientWidth
                document.onmousemove = (even:any):void => {
                    const end = even.clientX
                    if(box === '.resize-left-box') {
                        fold['leftWidth'] = end - start + itemWidth
                    }
                    if(box === '.resizeBox-right') {
                        rw.value = itemWidth + (start - end)
                    }
                    //这个应该是画布的
                    if(store.state.experiment.expGraph) {
                        store.state.experiment.expGraph.resizeGraph()
                    }
                }
                document.onmouseup = ():void => {
                    document.onmousemove = null
                    document.onmouseup = null
                    if (lineDom.releaseCapture){
                        lineDom.releaseCapture()
                    }
                    if (lineDom.setCapture) {
                        lineDom.setCapture()
                    }
                    return false
                }
            }
        }
        const resetWidth = () => {
            doResize('.left', '.resize-left-box')
            doResize('.right-line', '.resizeBox-right')
        }
        // 判断是否有收回的left
        const isExpand = computed(()=>{
            const notExpand = Object.keys(expandObj).filter((item:any)=>{
                return !expandObj[item]
            })
            return !!notExpand.length
        })
        const expandObj: any = reactive({
            expand:true
        })
        const fold: any = reactive({
            leftWidth: ref(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(props.leftWidth))),
            left1Width: ref(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(props.leftWidth)))
        })

        const exPandEvent = (v:boolean) => {
            expandObj['leftWidth'] = v ? props.leftWidth: 0
            expandObj['expand'] = v
        }
        onMounted(()=>{
            expandObj['expand'] = true
            nextTick(resetWidth)
        })

        return () => {
            return (
                <div class="resizeBox">
                    <div class="expand-box" v-show={isExpand.value}>
                        <div v-show={!expandObj.expand} class="expandBtn" style={{top:0}} onClick={()=>{exPandEvent(true)}}>
                            <div class="top-triangle"></div>
                            <div class="text">
                                <span>{props.leftTitle}</span>
                                <span class="m-t-5 el-icon-d-arrow-right"></span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="bottom-triangle"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="resize-left-common resize-left-box" style={{
                        flex:`0 0 ${expandObj['expand'] ? fold['leftWidth']: 0} px`,
                        marginLeft:!expandObj['expand'] || !isExpand.value ? 0 : '10px'
                    }}>
                        <div v-show={expandObj['expand']} class={['leftContent', props.bg? 'backg': 'default']}>
                            <div class="custom-tree-box default-tree-box" style={{height: '100%',overflow:'auto'}}>
                                {slots.left ? slots.left(): ''}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div v-show={expandObj['expand']} class="left-line left">
                    </div>
                    <div class={['resizeBox-center',props.centerClass]}
                        style={props.centerStyle}
                    >
                        {slots.center ? slots.center() : ''}
                    </div>
                    {
                        slots.right ? (
                            <div class="resizeBox-right">
                                {slots.right()}
                                <div class="right-line" />
                            </div>
                        ):('')
                    }
                </div>
            )
        }
    }
   })

    .resizeBox {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        display: flex;
        .expand-box {
            height: 100%;
            position: relative;
            flex: 0 0 48px;
        }
        .resizeBox-right {
            position:relative;
        }
        .resize-left-common,
        .resizeBox-right{
            overflow: hidden;
            .left-line,
            .right-line {
                width:0;
                height: 98%;
                position:absolute;
                top:50%;
                transform:translateY(-50%);
                z-index:10;
                cursor:col-resize;
                border-left:1px solid transparent;
                border-right:1px solid transparent
            }
            .left-line {
                right:0;
            }
            .right-line{
                left:0;
            }
        }
        .expandBtn{
            width: 38px;
            text-align:center;
            cursor:pointer;
            position:absolute;
            top:20px;
            left:0;
            background:transparent;
            z-index:1;
            .top-triangle{
                width:0px;
                height:0px;
                border-top:24px solid transparent;
                border-right: 38px solid transparent;
                border-bottom:24px solid rgb(49,137,203);
            }
            .text {
                background:rgb(49,137,203);
                color:#fff;
                display:flex;
                flex-direction:column;
                align-items:center;
                //writing-mode 属性定义了文本在水平或垂直方向上如何排布。
                //vertical-lr：垂直方向内内容从上到下，水平方向从左到右
                span {
                    writing-mode:vertical-lr;
                }
            }
            .bottom-triangle {
                width:0px;
                height:0px;
                border-top:24px solid rgb(49,137,203);
                border-right:38px solid transparent;
                border-bottom:24px solid transparent;
            }
        }
        .resize-left-common{
            position:relative;
            .leftContent{
                width:100%;
                height:100%;
                display:flex;
                flex-direction:column;
                overflow:hidden;
                border:1px solid #e5e5e5;
                .head{
                    display:flex;
                    align-items:center;
                    justify-content:space-between;
                    .icon{
                        cursor:pointer;
                    }
                    padding:0 20px 0 0;
                }
                &.default{
                    .head{
                        height: 36px;
                        border-bottom: #e5e5e5 1px solid
                        .trapezoid {
                            height: 100%;
                            width: 100%;
                            display:flex;
                            overflow:hidden;
                            .head-title{
                                height:36px;
                                background-color:rgba(49,137,203,1);
                                display:flex;
                                align-items:center;
                                padding:0 20px;
                                width:fit-content;
                                font-weight:500
                                font-size:18px;
                                color:#fff
                            }
                            .triangle{
                                width:0px;
                                height:0px;
                                border-top:36px solid rgba(49,137,203,1);
                                border-right:18px solid #fff;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                &.backg {
                    background:rgb(49,137,203) url('');
                    .head{
                        height:54px;
                        color:#fff;
                        padding:0 20px;
                        .head-title{
                            border-left:4px solid #fff;
                            padding-left:5px;
                            font-size:18px;
                        }
                    }
                }
                .default-tree-box{
                    height: 100%
                }
            }
        }
        .resizeBox-right{
            margin:10px;
            margin-left:0;
        }
        .resizeBox-center{
            width:100%;
            overflow:hidden;
            margin:10px;
        }
        .nest-resize-box{
            margin:0 0 0  10px;
        }
    }

item.title: cancanFailureCase
item.description: 2种a链接下载 第一种传递参数为res,文件名,contentType
item.content:encoded:
download:(content:string,fileName:string,contentType='application/octet-stream')=>{
    const a = document.createElement('a')
    const file = new Blob([content],{type:contentType})
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(file)
    a.download = fileName
    a.click()
    URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href)
}
const downloadFile=function(path,name){
    const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
    xhr.open('get',path)
    xhr.responseType = 'blob'
    xhr.send()
    xhr.onload = function () {
        if(this.status === 200 || this.status === 304){
            // 如果是IE10及以上，不支持download属性，采用msSaveOrOpenBlob方法，但是IE10以下也不支持msSaveOrOpenBlob
            if('msSaveOrOpenBlob' in navigator) {
                navigator.msSaveOrOpenBlob(this.response,name)
            }
            // const blob = new Blob([this.response],{type:xhr.getResponseHeader('Content-Type')})
            // const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(this.response)
            const a = document.createElement('a')
            a.style.display = 'none'
            a.href = url
            a.download = name
            document.body.appendChild(a)
            a.click()
            document.body.removeChild(a)
            URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
        }
    }
}
    window.open(url)
    //伪代码写写原生ajax请求
    let xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
    //如果是get请求不用设置请求头
    xhr.open('get',url)
    //如果是post请求
    //xhr.open('post',url)
    //xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type','application/www-form-urlencoded')
    xhr.send()
    xhr.onreadstatechange=function(){
        if(xhr.readstate === 4 && xhr.state === 200){
            const res = xhr.response.xxx
        }
    }

2种a链接下载 第一种传递参数为res,文件名,contentType 第二种传递参数为url,文件名 自我认为但是注释部分可以替代第一种写法

  • vue3tsx写法公共组件封装写法
    import { defineComponent } from 'vue';
    export default defineComponent({
        name:'commonCard',
        props:{
            title: {
                type:String,
                default:''
            },
            customBodyStyle: {
                type:Object,
                default:() => {
                    return {}
                }
            },
            showTitle: {
                type: Boolean,
                default: true
            }
        },
        setup(props, { slots }) {
            return () => {
                return (
                    <div class="box-container">
                        <div class="box-header v-show={props.showTitle}">
                        {
                          slots.title ? (slots.title()):(
                            <div>
                                <div class="title">{props.title}</div>
                                <div class="second-title">
                                    {slots.secondTitle && slots.secondTitle()}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        <div class="box-body" style={props.customBodyStyle}>        
                            {slots.body && slots.body()}
                        </div>
                    <div>
                )
            }
        }
    })
    .box-container{
        width:100%;
        height:100%;
        border-radius:16px;
        overflow:hidden;
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        box-shadow:0px 0px 8px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.16),inset 0px 1px 35px 0px #fff;
        border: 1px solid #fff;
        .box-header {
            height: 50px;
            line-height: 50px;
            padding: 0 20px 0 30px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap:nowrap;
            justify-content: space-between;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #fff;
            background:#fff;
            .box-title {
                display:flex;
                margin-left:-1px;
                margin-top:-1px;
                .title {
                display:flex;
                align-items:center;
                font-size:24px;
                color:#000;
                }
                .title:before {
                    content: '';
                    width: 5px;
                    height: 20px;
                    background-color:#004892;
                    border-radius: 3px;
                    margin-right: 10px;
                }
            }
            .box-button {
                height: 100%;
                display:flex;
                align-items: center;
                .buttons {
                    display:flex;
                    align-items:center;
                }
            }
        } 
        .box-body {
            flex:1;
            width:100%;
            height:100%;
            overflow:auto;
            padding:10px 20px 20px 20px;
            background:#fff;
        }
    }
  • vue3tsx写法组件使用 example
    return () => {
        return (
            <el-row>
                <el-col>
                    <commonCard title="xxx" style="width:100px;height:100%" v-slots={{
                        body:()=>{
                            return(
                                <div></div>
                            )
                        }
                    }} />
                </el-col>
            <el-row>
        )
    }
    <commonCard style="width:100%;height:100%" 
    v-slots={{
        title:() =>{
            return (
                <div></div>
            )
        },
        body: () => {
            return (
                <div></div>
            )
        }
    }} />

item.title: Weather
item.content:encoded:
-今天我好高兴 今天天气真不错 slug：访问路径 title：标题 image_url：图片地址 url:地址
clone function 

function copyAddObj(oldObj){
    let newObj = {}
    for(let key in oldObj){
        newObj[key] = oldObj[key]
    }
    newObj.add = false
    newObj.update = false
    newObj.delete = false
    newObj.check = false
    return newObj
}
function deepCloneObj(oldObj){
    let newObj = {}
    for (let key in oldObj){
        if(typeof oldObj[key] === 'Array' || typeof oldObj[key] === 'Object){
            newObj[key] = deepCloneObj(oldObj[key])
        }else{
            newObj[key] = oldObj[key]
        }
    }
    return newObj
}

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Docusaurus blogging features are powered by the blog plugin.
item.content:encoded:
Docusaurus blogging features are powered by the blog plugin.

Simply add Markdown files (or folders) to the blog directory.

Regular blog authors can be added to authors.yml.

The blog post date can be extracted from filenames, such as:

  • 2019-05-30-welcome.md
  • 2019-05-30-welcome/index.md

A blog post folder can be convenient to co-locate blog post images:

The blog supports tags as well!

And if you don't want a blog: just delete this directory, and use blog: false in your Docusaurus config.
